Pricing

Simple pricing, built for reliable orchestration. Two plans. Pick the one that fits.

No hidden fees. Cancel anytime. Everything you need to run jobs, workflows, and operational controls in one platform.

Personal from $190.00/moPro from $490.00/moSave 20% yearly

Pick the plan that matches your workload. Both plans include the core job runtime.

Save -900%

Personal

For individual writers and creators.

$190/mo billed yearly
  • AI interview
  • Multi-draft generation
  • Style guidance
  • Export options
Start Personal
Most popular

Pro

For teams and power users who need advanced workflows.

$490/mo billed yearly
  • Everything in Personal
  • Advanced editing tools
  • Priority support
  • Higher usage limits
Start Pro

All plans include core orchestration capabilities. Cancel anytime.

Ready to run every workflow from one place?

Give your team a cleaner way to launch work, monitor progress, and recover fast when runs fail.

Start with Strait

Built for modern engineering teams that want fewer moving parts and faster recovery.

Strait

Production-grade job orchestration for teams building reliable asynchronous systems.
